commitMessage: Revert "Reapply "Add R key to reset game from any state""

topics.title: Remove keyboard reset shortcut and revert related UI changes
topics.trigger: A previously added feature allowing players to reset the snake game at any time by pressing the R key was reverted, along with its associated on-screen instructions and a related UI fix.
topics.response:
- The R key handler was removed from `src/main.ts`, eliminating the ability to reset the game from any state via keyboard shortcut.
- The on-screen control hint in `index.html` was updated to remove the "Press R to Reset" instruction, restoring the original controls text.
- A line in `src/main.ts` that hid the pause screen overlay when starting a new game was also removed as part of the revert.
topics.decisions: The entire feature was reverted rather than patched. This suggests the reset-from-any-state behavior introduced a problem significant enough to warrant a clean rollback rather than a targeted fix, preserving the prior stable state while the issue is reconsidered.

recap: The ability to reset the snake game at any time by pressing the R key was removed. This reverts a recently added feature, restoring the game to its prior behavior where no keyboard shortcut existed for resetting mid-game. The on-screen control instructions no longer mention a reset key, and the game's new-game flow returns to its previous state.
